parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number your are on.

parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: StateInvoice
parameters.description: Filter ressources by invoice status.

schema.description:
Granular technical state of an invoice. Each value maps to a functional Status.

| Value | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Draft | Draft | Basic draft. |
| DraftCharging | Draft | Being charged; will be issued if the charge succeeds. |
| DueAuto | Due | Due and automatically processed. |
| DueOffline | Due | Due; offline payment expected. |
| DueToProcess | Due | Due; will be processed later (e.g., batch). |
| DuePending | Due | Due; payment pending. |
| Paid | Paid | Invoice paid. |
| PaidRefunded | Paid | Paid but subsequently refunded. |
| ProblemAuto | Problem | Automated payment encountered issues. |
| ProblemOverdue | Problem | Invoice overdue. |
| ProblemDisputed | Problem | Payment disputed. |
| Void | Void | Cancelled before payment attempt. |
| Uncollectible | Uncollectible | Payment cannot be collected. |
schema.title: InvoiceStatus

parameters.name: fullNumber
parameters.description: Filter ressources by invoice full number.

parameters.name: IdCustomer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by customer Id.

parameters.name: DateIssueMin
parameters.description: Filter resources with issue date greater then after the selected date.

parameters.name: DateIssueMax
parameters.description: Filter resources with issue date lower then after the selected date.

parameters.name: DatePaymentMin
parameters.description: Filter resources with payment date greater then after the selected date.

parameters.name: DatePaymentMax
parameters.description: Filter resources with payment date lower then after the selected date.

parameters.name: AmountSubtotal
parameters.description: Filter ressources with subtotal amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountSubtotalMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with subtotal amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountSubtotalMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with subtotal amount lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTotal
parameters.description: Filter ressources with total amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTotalMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with total amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountTotalMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with total amount lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Filter ressources by language ISO code.

parameters.name: TypePayment
parameters.description: Filter by payment type.

schema.description:
Type of payment

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Free | Subscription is free, no payment ever requested. |
| ExternalCheck | Payment with check. |
| ExternalCash | Payment with cash. |
| ExternalBank | Payment by wire transfer. |
| ExternalOther | Other payment type. |
| Card | Payment with payment card, automated renewal. |
| DirectDebit | Payment with bank account info, automated renewal. |
schema.title: PaymentTypes

schema.description:
Allow to get detailed subresources about invoice.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| AddressBilling | Add billing address related to customer who paid the subscription.|
| AddressBusiness | Add address of the business issuing the invoice.|
| Customer | Add details about the billed customer.|
| CustomerBilling | add current custome billing.|
| CustomerSettingsPayment | Add details about the payment settings related to the customer.|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| SettingsPayment | Add details about the payment settings related to the invoice.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: InvoiceExtra
